_comment: Honest per-platform capability matrix (PORT-01, Wave 48). Each platform declares which portable nobro_hal provider contracts it satisfies, at what tier, so 'platform breadth' is machine-checkable and never an nRF-shaped placeholder. Tiers: deep = implemented + on-hardware HIL evidence; provider = portable trait implemented + compile-verified against the real target (on-HW HIL bench-gated); conformance = runs the shared portable-core suite; absent = not implemented. validated_by names how the claim is checked.

rp2350.hil: bench-gated (no RP2350 board on the primary bench)
rp2350.validated_by: portable timebase provider compile-verified for thumbv8m + live verify_timebase_provider() in the port self-test; conformance suite (7 subsystems) + dual-core

esp32c3.limitations: no PPI-equivalent hardware event router; servo PWM via LEDC/MCPWM differs from the nRF model
esp32c3.hil: bench-gated (no ESP32-C3 board on the primary bench)
esp32c3.validated_by: portable timebase provider compile-verified for riscv32imc + live verify_timebase_provider() in the port self-test; conformance suite (7 subsystems)
